# Source: https://developers.webflow.com/flowkit/structure/page-structure.mdx

***

title: Page Structure
slug: structure/page-structure
description: Page and section structure in the Flowkit Framework.
hidden: null
'og:title': Flowkit - Page Structure
'og:description': Page and section structure in the Flowkit Framework.
----------------------------------------------------------------------

## Page Structure

The Webflow CSS Framework uses a semantic and component-based layout system. Here's a typical page layout using semantic tags:

<div>
  Page – tag: `Body`, selector: <span class="sg-selector sg-tag">Body (All Pages)</span>

  <div>
    <div>
      Navigation – tag: `nav`, class: <span class="sg-selector sg-class">nav</span>
    </div>

    <div>
      Section – tag: `section`, class: <span class="sg-selector sg-class">section</span>

      <div>
        Container – tag: `div`, class: <span class="sg-selector sg-class">container</span>

        <div>
          Layout – e.g., grid, flex, card
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div>
      Footer – tag: `footer`, class: <span class="sg-selector sg-class">footer</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

**Page structure**

***

## Section

Sections are the core layout blocks of a page. Each section must use the semantic `Section` tag, which can be set in the Webflow Settings Panel.

<img src="https://files.buildwithfern.com/https://webflow.docs.buildwithfern.com/a709816865689d06e8c2b0db56ad771fe9be1ab31587b87c1e28455dfbe70c5d/products/flowkit/pages/v2/page-structure/flowkit_settings.webp" alt="Settings pannel" />

### Variations

The main class <span class="sg-selector sg-class">section</span> sets the section's structure and default padding. Variations are applied with combo classes to adjust background and font colors.
Combo classes follow the pattern: <span class="sg-selector sg-class">section</span> <span class="sg-selector sg-class">is-secondary</span>

* <span class="sg-selector sg-class">
    section
  </span>
  <span class="sg-selector sg-class">
    is-secondary
  </span>
* <span class="sg-selector sg-class">
    section
  </span>
  <span class="sg-selector sg-class">
    is-accent-primary
  </span>
* <span class="sg-selector sg-class">
    section
  </span>
  <span class="sg-selector sg-class">
    is-accent-secondary
  </span>
* <span class="sg-selector sg-class">
    section
  </span>
  <span class="sg-selector sg-class">
    is-accent-tertiary
  </span>
* <span class="sg-selector sg-class">
    section
  </span>
  <span class="sg-selector sg-class">
    is-inverse
  </span>

### Padding

The <span class="sg-selector sg-class">section</span> class includes vertical padding by default. Use utilities to adjust:

| Utility Class                                                                                                                | Description                    |
| ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------ |
| <span class="sg-selector sg-class">padding\_none</span>                                                                      | Removes top & bottom spacing   |
| <span class="sg-selector sg-class">padding-vertical\_small</span>                                                            | Sets vertical spacing to small |
| <span class="sg-selector sg-class">padding-top\_none</span>, <span class="sg-selector sg-class">padding-bottom\_small</span> | Fine-tuned vertical control    |

***

## Container

The <span class="sg-selector sg-class">container</span> class centers content and applies a max-width with internal horizontal padding. It ensures consistent alignment across all layouts.

These combo classes adjust the width:

| Class Example                                                                                               | Description                          |
| ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------ |
| <span class="sg-selector sg-class">container</span>                                                         | Default max width (standard layout)  |
| <span class="sg-selector sg-class">container</span> <span class="sg-selector sg-class">is-full-width</span> | Stretches full width (edge-to-edge)  |
| <span class="sg-selector sg-class">container</span> <span class="sg-selector sg-class">is-large</span>      | Larger max width                     |
| <span class="sg-selector sg-class">container</span> <span class="sg-selector sg-class">is-small</span>      | Smaller max width for narrow layouts |

### Padding Control

Adjust internal padding using utility classes:

* <span class="sg-selector sg-class">padding-horizontal\_none</span> — removes side padding

***

## Navigation

The navigation bar uses the semantic `nav` tag and a base class <span class="sg-selector sg-class">Nav</span>.

Navigation adapts to the background color using combo classes:

* <span class="sg-selector sg-class">
    nav
  </span>
  <span class="sg-selector sg-class">
    is-accent-primary
  </span>
* <span class="sg-selector sg-class">
    nav
  </span>
  <span class="sg-selector sg-class">
    is-accent-secondary
  </span>
* <span class="sg-selector sg-class">
    nav
  </span>
  <span class="sg-selector sg-class">
    is-accent-tertiary
  </span>
* <span class="sg-selector sg-class">
    nav
  </span>
  <span class="sg-selector sg-class">
    is-inverse
  </span>
* <span class="sg-selector sg-class">
    nav
  </span>
  <span class="sg-selector sg-class">
    is-secondary
  </span>

***

## Footer

Footer uses `footer` semantic tag and class <span class="sg-selector sg-class">Footer</span>.

Footer also adapts to the background color using combo classes:

* <span class="sg-selector sg-class">
    footer
  </span>
  <span class="sg-selector sg-class">
    is-secondary
  </span>
* <span class="sg-selector sg-class">
    footer
  </span>
  <span class="sg-selector sg-class">
    is-inverse
  </span>
* <span class="sg-selector sg-class">
    footer
  </span>
  <span class="sg-selector sg-class">
    is-accent-primary
  </span>
* <span class="sg-selector sg-class">
    footer
  </span>
  <span class="sg-selector sg-class">
    is-accent-secondary
  </span>
* <span class="sg-selector sg-class">
    footer
  </span>
  <span class="sg-selector sg-class">
    is-accent-tertiary
  </span>

Every footer variation has a combo class for a footer link <span class="sg-selector sg-class">footer\_link</span> <span class="sg-selector sg-class">on-inverse</span> or <span class="sg-selector sg-class">on-accent-primary</span> etc.
